type.description: The reminder type. Mandatory. Possible codes are listed in ReminderTypes [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API).

status.description: The reminder status. Mandatory. Possible codes are listed in ReminderStatuses [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API).

reminder_date.description: The date on which the reminder is applied. Mandatory.
